creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

I'm having hard time reproducing it: on 9.2-RELEASE, nvidia_acpi.c builds 
cleanly (yes, with -Werror).  Can you please update the port to the latest 
version and recheck?  If the bug is still there for you, I'd like to know 
your compiler version (e.g. cc -v).
